text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Tokai Teio has a multitude of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Do you remember that ticket I gave
you for safekeeping?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The one I won in the raffle! For the hot springs!
Remember? When I reached senior year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Now that she mentions it... I do remember.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio said she wanted to go with someone
once she could take a break from racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Of course I kept it safe. I take it from my pocket
and try to give it to her, but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, about that ticket... You don't need to give
it back to me after all.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I want you to have it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she was looking forward to going with
Symboli Rudolf, or perhaps one of her other
friends. Why would she...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I mean, there's not much point giving it back to
me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Since we're both going, it doesn't matter whether
it's me holding it or you, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I finally decided who I'm inviting to go with me!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And the lucky person is—drumroll, please—you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's time for a road trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So in a surprising turn of events, I end up
accompanying Tokai Teio to the hot springs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But why did she pick me? The question still rattles
around in my head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... The bath was so relaxing! I swear I could
just stare at the steam or the scenery for ages...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's great to do stuff like this sometimes. Makes
me feel kinda mature.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Are you enjoying yourself too, Trainer?
choice_data_list: I am... but why'd you choose me?
I am... but why'd you choose me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without thinking, I spill the question that's been
on my mind. I'd been so sure she would go with
someone else.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, "why"? Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I wanted to go on a hot spring trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I return to my room as puzzled as ever. Before
long, Tokai Teio drops by to hang out.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You still don't get it, do you? It's not that
complicated really.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Look, if I went with Prez, it wouldn't be a hot
springs trip. It'd be a Prez trip, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'd be so caught up in being with Prez, I wouldn't
be able to enjoy being here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it'd be the same deal if I went with one of my
friends! It'd just feel like a hangout session!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But that's not what I wanted this time. I just
wanted a normal vacation.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Cause you know, I've barely had any alone time
lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Alone time"... Come to think of it, she's always
been surrounded by people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only is she beloved by all, but even when the
focus isn't on her, she leaps in and takes it. That's
just who she is.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've gotten super fast now, right? Just like Prez.
But the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Prez is amazing even off the track... But I don't
feel like I can say the same about me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it's because I never had enough time
to myself.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
When I stepped into the water just now, I was
kinda impressed by how good it felt.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And when I looked around at the beautiful
scenery, my heart even skipped a beat.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't think Prez would've reacted in the same
way... But it's how I felt.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm sure the more I learn, the more I'll change too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I won't just become the Monarch who surpasses
the Emperor, but one who stands on her own!
Separate from her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, Tokai Teio's young expression
looks a little more mature.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio has grown in many ways over these
past few years, but that growth has mostly been
on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a person, she's still only just taking her first
steps into adulthood. She still has so much growth
left to look forward to.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm really glad you're the one who's here
with me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I would've felt this way if I'd come
with anyone else.
choice_data_list: You sure I'm not in the way?
You sure I'm not in the way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm interrupting the alone time she
wanted...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No, that's totally different. 'Cause, I mean... it's
you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're the one who teaches me, who gives me
advice. I've gotten to where I am because of you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're not just some person to me...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're the person who makes me who I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes shine bright with trust.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether she grows into a refined role model, or a
bubbly older sister type...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know those honest eyes will never change.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time for food! I'm sure they've got a lot of
exotic stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You gotta tell me what everything on the menu is
so I can get the most out of it!
choice_data_list: You're not going to eat too much, are you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on! It's vacation! Besides, I'm starving!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I want to make this a learning experience too! So
lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we sit down side by side for a
wonderful meal together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Tokai Teio and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
